title: IconsTab
description: Add icons to the world creation section!
body:
**Adds 3 Bedrock style 3D icons to the Create World section in Java Edition**

### Compatible MC Versions
| Version | Compatibility |
| ------ | -----|
| 1.21x | ✔ |
| 1.20x | ✔  |

- **Minecraft Map Integration:** View the location of textures directly on an interactive map. [Here]([https://claritypack.com/restworld/](https://claritypack.com/restworld/))
